member.name: T:SegmentTreeConsole.GenericSegmentTree`3
member.summary: Generic segment tree, customizable to different operations and data types

member.name: F:SegmentTreeConsole.GenericSegmentTree`3.DataLength
member.summary: The length of the input data
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Initial array of values for the segment tree. Must be non-empty.
Function that applies a non-lazy update to a node's attributes.
Function that applies lazy attributes from a parent to a child node.
Function that combines the current node with its left and right children to produce the parent's attributes.
Function that combines two partial query results into a single query result.
Function that creates a node given a value, leaf flag, left index and right index.
